name: command-palette
title: Command palette
description: A ⌘K / Ctrl+K command palette: a modal dialog holding a type-ahead search input over a roving-focus command list. Baseline is a real <dialog> with a filterable <ul role="listbox">; command-palette.js layers the global shortcut, incremental filtering, and ArrowUp/Down + Enter selection. A composed recipe — no custom element required to consume it.

cem.name: CommandPalette
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the command-palette preset — a ⌘K modal command launcher. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal command-palette.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Reflects the dialog open state; toggled by the global shortcut or the trigger button.

attributes.name: aria-activedescendant
attributes.description: Id of the currently-highlighted command option in the listbox.

slots.description: Command options — each an <li role="option"> with a label and optional shortcut hint.

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1 API-descriptor layer).
